title: Screw SubAnomalyOne
description: Discards/despawns SubAnomaly1 whenever he spawns in TheBrokenScript horror mod. With new 3.0 version, you can add more than one entity to the discard list!
body:
This mod immediately despawns/discards the SubAnomaly1 entity whenever it spawns! Also used on the **official TBS-SMP!**
![Despawning SubAnomaly1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5585ab7d7281b3198abbe4c4471c980411a193d9.png)
[TheBrokenScript](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-broken-script) is a dependency for this mod. You won't be able to run it without.

### _NEW: Since version 3.0, you can add multiple entities to get automatically discarded/deleted upon trying to spawn. Give the config a look :P_


This is what SubAnomaly1 looks like, by the way. Image taken from the [wiki](https://thebrokenscript.wiki.gg/wiki/Sub_Anomaly_1)

![SubAnomaly1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e1940e8450dda3c61090ff2e245494d812251a7_0.webp)
